name: Moscone Center
summary_en: Archived records document the Moscone Center largely through its expansion: Board of Supervisors minutes and a Board journal on financing the George R. Moscone Convention Center expansion, several Yerba Buena Center environmental impact reports covering the convention center's construction and growth, and Arts Commission Visual Arts Committee agendas on art-enrichment commissions for the site. The center is under the City Administrator (ADM), whose FY2025 budget line totaled $288M. The place file records no contracts naming it.
